qids.subject: Digital Logic
qids.prose: Consider the circuit in the diagram. The operator represents Ex-OR. The D flip-flops are initialized to zeroes (cleared). The following data: is supplied to the "data" terminal in nine clock cycles. After that the values of are: A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Digital Logic
qids.prose: You are given a free running clock with a duty cycle of and a digital waveform which changes only at the negative edge of the clock. Which one of the following circuits (using clocked D flip-flops) will delay the phase of by ? A. B. C. D.
